active_ingredients.name: Azoxystrobin
active_ingredients.mode_of_action: QoI fungicide that blocks mitochondrial respiration in fungi and stops energy production

mode_of_action_summary: Absorbed by the plant and moves within leaf tissue, stopping fungal spore germination and growth by blocking energy formation.

application_details.coverage_requirement: Uniform coverage on both sides of leaves

tank_mix_compatibility: Compatible with most commonly used fungicides and insecticides (jar test recommended)

resistance_management.rotation_advice: Do not apply more than two consecutive sprays. Rotate with fungicides of different mode of action such as triazoles, mancozeb or sulphur.

safety.first_aid: In case of contact with eyes or skin wash immediately with clean water.

storage.storage_conditions: Store in cool, dry place away from direct sunlight

llm_usage_hint: When recommending this product, highlight systemic action, long residual control, greening effect and resistance rotation advice.

master_descriptions.english: FACEUP 56% SC is a systemic strobilurin fungicide containing Azoxystrobin that provides long-lasting preventive and curative control of major fungal diseases.
master_descriptions.urdu: فیس اپ 56٪ ایس سی ایک سسٹمک فنگس کش دوا ہے جس میں ایزوکسسٹر وبن شامل ہے اور یہ فصل کو دیرپا تحفظ فراہم کرتی ہے۔
master_descriptions.punjabi_shahmukhi: فیس اپ 56٪ ایس سی اک سسٹمک فنگس کش اے جو ایزوکسسٹر وبن تے مشتمل اے تے بیماری توں لمبے سمے تک حفاظت فراہم کردا اے۔
